title: Teto Totem Tetotem
description:
Kasane Teto as a Totem! with extras ;]

for the extras maybe have a look in side the pack folders :]

and custom totem pop sound
body:
This is a Resource Pack that adds Kasane Teto to Minecraft as your Totem of Undying, complete with a surprise when the totem activates. Instead of a quiet, serious revival moment, you’ll hear Teto mock you with:

“You really are an idiot, aren’t you?”

Yep. That’s right. She saves your life, but she’s not gonna let you forget how close you were to dying. 

And On Top of all that I have hidden some "yummy" hidden secrets be sure to check the pack folder to see them ;]

Enjoy!
